body:
As added in https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaArtifacts/pull/49

30 arcseconds is already pretty high resolution

### Issues closed by this PR
High-res land/sea mask closes #936
Artifact removal closes https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/730 and https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/1016
Manifest removal in seabreeze and perf closes https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/1056
perf/ removal closes #1057 

This PR also removes all the artifact infrastructure from ClimaCoupler.
title: Use higher resolution land-sea mask

body:
The code that read the component dts used eval
and symbols to create the component dt vars.

This is changed to keep them in a dict. dt_atmos is held in this dict, but it is not actually used. I kept it there for consistency, but it could be removed.

<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Remove usage of eval to create vars based on config/command line arguments in run_amip.


## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
The component dts are now held in a dict

title: Refactor independent time step argument reading
